name: profiler-hotpath
title: Profiler / Hot Path
description: Returns the top N most expensive functions in a profiler frame, sorted by self time or total time. Useful for quickly identifying performance bottlenecks without reading the full hierarchy.

parameters.name: frameIndex
parameters.description: Frame index to analyze. Use -1 for the latest available frame. Default: -1

parameters.name: topN
parameters.description: Number of top entries to return. Default: 20

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by 'selfTime' or 'totalTime'. Default: selfTime Values: [TotalTime, SelfTime]

parameters.name: maxDepth
parameters.description: Maximum tree depth to scan. Deeper = more complete but slower. Default: 15

commonMistakes: Tool name is profiler-hotpath (no extra hyphen), NOT profiler-hot-path
